name: TransMemory
short_description: I woke up in a dimly lit basement. You have no memory of who you are or why you are here. Can you escape from this place?
detailed_description:
TransMemory is a single-player, first-person exploration horror game.
While being chased by a doll, you must search for items and try to escape from the basement.

Synopsis

You wake up in a dimly lit basement.
You have no memory of who you are or why you are here.
You hear footsteps and turn around to find a creepy doll standing there.
Can you escape from the basement where this creepy doll roams?

Controls

WASD - Move
SHIFT - Run
CTRL - Crouch
LEFT CLICK - Interact

Play Time

30~60 minutes

About video distribution

You may distribute your videos without permission, regardless of whether you are an individual or a corporation.
Monetization is only possible when you use the functions provided by the video distribution site.
We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of the video or streaming video, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section.
These guidelines are subject to change without notice.
